mnemonic: daughter [до'тэ] дочь - Его дочь на (доты) кинулась.

examples.eng: She was like a daughter to me.
They had one daughter.
I worry about my daughter.
examples.ru: Я волнуюсь о своей дочери. / Меня беспокоит моя дочь.

examples.eng: Stay away from my daughter!
My eldest daughter is 17.
Can your daughter count yet?
He dotes (up)on his daughter.
examples.ru: Он души не чает в дочери.

examples.eng: We named our daughter "Mary" in honor of her grandmother.
examples.ru: Мы назвали нашу дочь Марией, в честь её бабушки.

examples.eng: We named our daughter Sarah.
I took her to be his daughter.
examples.ru: Я принял её за его дочь.

examples.eng: This is my darling daughter, Sara.
We have a daughter and two sons.
examples.ru: У нас дочь и два сына.

examples.eng: She posed as the Czar's daughter.
examples.ru: Она выдавала себя за царскую дочь.

examples.eng: His daughter sprang to his embrace.
She's got two daughters and one son.
examples.ru: У неё две дочери и один сын.

examples.eng: the daughter of MP Tony Benn
His daughter is a real stunner.
a daughter's bond with her mother
His daughter keeps house for him.
examples.ru: Дочь ведёт за него домашнее хозяйство.

examples.eng: My daughter's a freshman at UCLA.
examples.ru: Моя дочь — студентка первого курса УКЛА.

examples.eng: They have two sons and a daughter.
examples.ru: У них два сына и дочь.

examples.eng: Her daughter has cute blonde curls.
examples.ru: У её дочери милые светлые локоны /кудряшки/.

examples.eng: A suitable match for their daughter.
She has an eight-month-old daughter.
She has sole custody of her daughter.
examples.ru: Она несёт единоличную опеку над дочерью.

examples.eng: Her daughter was a thorough coquette.
He named his daughter as his executor.
He made the deed over to his daughter.
examples.ru: Он переоформил документ на право владения на имя своей дочери.

examples.eng: I laughed at my daughter's monkeyshines.
Her daughter kept on weeing all the time.
